title: stellaria longipes var. arenicola
intro: Stellaria longipes var. arenicola, also known as Sandstar or Beach Starwort, is a perennial plant that belongs to the primrose family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Stellaria longipes var. arenicola include its ability to reduce fever, soothe sore throats, and alleviate congestion, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds and flu. Stellaria longipes var. arenicola can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
